name: @devplusllc/harness-lens
description: Inline citation context for §V invariants and TODO(TSK-) tokens. Hovers, gutter icons, code lens — resolved from .harness/ground/ ledgers.

harness.lens.enabled.description: Master switch for Harness Lens features.

harness.lens.inlineDecorations.description: Render ghost text after §V<N> tokens with the resolved invariant title.

harness.lens.gutterIcons.description: Show citation health icons in the gutter (active / superseded / not found).

harness.lens.codeLens.description: Render a Code Lens line above functions whose file matches a decision's scope_globs.

harness.lens.decExplorer.description: Show the DEC Explorer sidebar tree view.
